title: favouritesReducer.js — initial favouritesFetched changed from false to null
commit_message: fix: distinguish unknown fetch state from explicit false

why_single_feature_file.explanation: Only favouritesReducer.js changes. All CRITICAL tests are under describe('favouritesReducer'). toastReducer tests live in the same feature file and are HIGH (same-suite defensive inclusion). No other feature file or cross-dependent suite lists favouritesReducer.js.
why_single_feature_file.key_point: 4 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH = 8 tests; 69 SKIP — tight scope comparable to scenario 5’s single-file feature isolation.

CRITICAL.reason: symbols[] contains favouritesReducer; sources include favouritesReducer.js

tests.test: favouritesReducer > starts with an empty userFavourites list
favouritesReducer > UPDATEALLFAVOURITIESDETAILS replaces the favourites list
favouritesReducer > sets favouritesFetched to true once the list is loaded
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — if test assumes initial favouritesFetched === false

tests.test: favouritesReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action
toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message in showToast
toastReducer > resets showToast to null when null is dispatched
toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action

SKIP.reason: favouritesReducer.js not in sources[] for other suites

coverage_gaps.detail: Initial state test should expect favouritesFetched == null (or use toBeNull()).
